prompt: A heavy, bespoke metal cast forged entirely around a single, highly irregular pile of sharp gravel stones. The rigid cast perfectly traces every meaningless, jagged crack and crevice of this specific random pile of rocks. The mold is so insanely precise that even a single grain of shifting sand makes it impossible to close or reuse elsewhere. Photorealistic, hyper-detailed craftsmanship, physical photography, stark lighting. No floating text, no diagrams, entirely real-world physical metaphor for extreme hyper-specialization. Style: Moody
metaphor: A rigid, immovable metal cast expertly tailored to a random pile of gravel, capturing every useless noise imperfection, rendering it permanently incapable of fitting any other object.
